mapper.select:
SELECT ID TALLY_ID HQ_DATA_ID CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME UPDATE_BY UPDATE_BY_NAME UPDATE_TIME FROM T_HQ_TALLY
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_HQ_TALLY(ID, TALLY_ID, HQ_DATA_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{tallyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hqDataId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_HQ_TALLY SET TALLY_ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HQ_DATA_ID = #{hqDataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
